rule_text: For Gulf Coast and other regional leisure travel, he prefers ground transportation over flights.

rule_text: When choosing stops for a fresh trip, he prefers culturally rich destinations such as music districts, art areas, historic neighborhoods, or festival-centered stops over generic sightseeing picks.
